intro: Tragacantha ochrochlora, also known as Astragalus membranaceus or Huang Qi, is a perennial plant in the legume family, traditionally used as a medicinal herb in Chinese and other traditional medicine systems. The health benefits of Tragacantha ochrochlora include enhancing immune function, reducing inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Tragacantha ochrochlora include capsules, tablets, and decoctions, as well as teas and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and reduce stress.
